allow: Bash(python manage.py makemigrations auth_app activity theme category config_app)
Bash(python -c "import os; os.environ['DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE']='config.settings'; import django; django.setup\(\); print\('OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "import django; import os; os.environ['DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE']='config.settings'; import django; django.setup\(\); from django.urls import get_resolver; r = get_resolver\(\); print\('URL conf OK'\); from django.apps import apps; print\('Apps:', [a.label for a in apps.get_app_configs\(\)]\)")
